div.h2: Hardware Detection → OS Managed Paging → Instruction Retry

p.strong: TDD Spec Module: Virtual Memory Simulator v1.0

ul.li: PFN 0x17 is mapped from the Buddy Allocator O(1) free list.
Page is zeroed if not backed by file to prevent data leakage.

div.p: Hardware Result: PA = (0x17 << 12) | 0x234 Target Physical Address: 0x17234
